rulings.Case Title: PAUL K LIU et al VS. SALLY L LIU et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Reopen Discovery And Compel Production Of Documents; Declaration Of Thomas Eastridge

rulings.Case Title: JAMES F. BLANDING VS. KANDACE PATRICE DAVIS et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Defendant Kandace Davis Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 2, 2011, line 13, Defendant Kandace Davis Motion To Set Aside Default And Default Judgment. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT & DEFAULT JUDGMENT IS GRANTED. DUE TO A COURT ERROR, THE DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH WAS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR. PLAINTIFF MISINTERPRETED THE COURT ACTION AND OBTAINED THE DEFAULT & DEFAULT JUDGMENT WHICH DEFENDANT WAS NOT AWARE OF. DEFENDANT MUST FILE A RESPONSIVE PLEADING TO THE COMPLAINT WITHIN 2 DAYS. =(302/LMG)

rulings.Case Title: BETTY ANN MORRIS VS. KEVIN DUNN et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn To Quash Summons
rulings.Rulings: Set for hearing on Friday, September 2, 2011, line 7, DEFENDANT KEVIN DUNN'S Motion To Quash Summons. DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO QUASH SUMMONS IS DENIED. THE MOTION IS NOT TIMELY UNDER CCP SECTION 1167.4. MOREOVER, WHETHER THE CLAIM PROPERLY STATES A CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER THE FACTS IS A QUESTION OF FACT MORE APPROPRIATELY ADDRESSED IN A MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. =(302/LMG)
